title: Refactor: Streamline dependencies and remove Pydantic/tomlkit
body:
## Description
Refactor the project to follow best practices for build plugins by minimizing the dependency footprint. This includes replacing Pydantic with standard library dataclasses and replacing tomlkit with tomli/tomllib.

## Assessment
**Type**: Enhancement / Refactor

## Proposed Solution
- Replace Pydantic schemas in `schemas.py` with `dataclasses`.
- Update TOML parsing to use `tomllib` (Python 3.11+) or `tomli` (fallback).
- Update `pyproject.toml` dependencies to use flexible version ranges.
- Ensure zero-conflict architecture for downstream users.
